name: Neighborhood Land Rule for Debt-Financed Property

eligibility.description: The land must be in the neighborhood of other exempt-use property and the organization must intend to use it for exempt purposes within 10 years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts real property from being treated as 'debt-financed property' (and thus avoids UBIT on income/gain) if acquired for exempt use within 10 years (15 for churches).
